name: Nascom Group
desc: A leading Lebanese group driving innovation across industries — from tech to infrastructure, proudly built in Lebanon.

name: Lulu Épicerie
desc: Diaspora-driven Lebanese bakery with emotional storytelling and strong branding — bringing authentic flavours & community vibes to Montreal.

name: Falafel St-Jacques
desc: Authentic Lebanese street food with a strong local following — casual, flavourful, and true to its roots.

name: Garage Beirut
desc: Youthful Lebanese street food brand with strong visual identity — modern twists on classic Beirut flavours.

name: Mezmiz
desc: Trendy Lebanese restaurant with strong Beirut-inspired branding and aesthetic — modern vibes meet authentic flavour.

name: Café Chez Téta
desc: Traditional Lebanese comfort food with a warm, family-driven identity — like eating at Téta's house.

name: Layla Restaurant
desc: Upscale Lebanese dining with a premium feel and strong visual identity — elevated Beirut cuisine in Montreal.

name: Restaurant Mezza
desc: Lebanese-focused casual dining with a strong Instagram presence — approachable and flavour-forward.

name: Restaurant Leymoun
desc: Small, homey Lebanese spot with strong community feel — cozy brunches and authentic dishes.
